transcription.text: Poor Cinderella. She couldn't go to the ball until she cleaned the sink. Now Cinderella had it tough To have no babble made it rough She worked harder than a dog But she couldn't get rid of old sink smog So sad she didn't have babble So sad she didn't have babble Too bad she could only wish she had Brighter, whiter babble And then appeared a fairy queen who said Here's how to get sinks clean Babble with power-packed suds, my dear We'll make that sink smog disappear Yes, babble's power-packed suds Sweeps away sink smog in seconds Whee! More drudgery, it's babble for me That's why so many, many, many My brighter, whiter babble No sink smog with babble

segments.text: Poor Cinderella.
She couldn't go to the ball until she cleaned the sink.
Now Cinderella had it tough
To have no babble made it rough
She worked harder than a dog
But she couldn't get rid of old sink smog
So sad she didn't have babble
So sad she didn't have babble
Too bad she could only wish she had
Brighter, whiter babble
And then appeared a fairy queen who said
Here's how to get sinks clean
Babble with power-packed suds, my dear
We'll make that sink smog disappear
Yes, babble's power-packed suds
Sweeps away sink smog in seconds
Whee!
More drudgery, it's babble for me
That's why so many, many, many
My brighter, whiter babble
No sink smog with babble
